---
title: "Projects"
---

# Major Enterprise Projects

## Microsoft Teams PSTN Migration

Led migration of enterprise PSTN users from Cisco Unified Communications Manager to Microsoft Teams Direct Routing infrastructure while maintaining compliance recording capabilities.

---

## Zoom Cloud Phone Implementation

Successfully migrated enterprise users from traditional PBX systems to Zoom Cloud Phone platform.

---

## Cisco UCM Cluster Deployment

Designed and deployed a Cisco Unified Communications Manager cluster for a new enterprise site in India supporting approximately 3000 users.

---

## NICE Voice Biometrics Implementation

Implemented real-time authentication using NICE Voice Biometrics for users across multiple countries.

---

## Speech Analytics Integration

Implemented speech analytics solution integrated with existing compliance recording infrastructure.

---

## Avaya to Cisco Migration

Migrated more than 4000 enterprise users from Avaya telephony systems to Cisco Unified Communications platform.
